2 / 249
Stations that produced no GNSS observations during the window. Each row shows the most likely cause based on connection events, power events, deployment status, and observation history.
STATIONSTATUS — what we observed
FIJM0xFINLong-term silent — No data received in over 30 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.
RONA0xROULong-term silent — No data received in over 30 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.

DURATION OF EMERGENCY POWER · per station · time on backup battery during window

Each event = one transition from grid power → backup battery (a single grid-loss). Multiple events at the same site = multiple separate outages (or repeated grid flickers). Duration shown is time without grid power, not necessarily time on battery — outages longer than the UPS battery life mean the station was offline for most of that time. Sources: ac_input_voltage (Adel UPS · direct measurement) and sar_alert_power_source_* (Back-UPS Pro · event-pair reconstruction).

ADVISORY · 1 site(s) had an unpaired backup_battery alert
These stations were observably online throughout the window but had a sar_alert_power_source_backup_battery_total increment with no corresponding grid_power_total recovery. Likely a spurious NetCloud alert or a brief recovery whose alert was dropped. Not counted in the KPIs above.
FRMG0xFRA

PATH CONNECTIONS · station connection health

Each row = one station. Uptime = how long it was reachable. Downtime = how long it was fully offline. Sources: sar_status_connection_online gauge for uptime/downtime · sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters for failover events. Note: per-SIM detail (SIM1 vs SIM2) is not yet available — Prometheus does not distinguish slot. Cellular session durations (used internally for classification) are estimated by event timing.

DATA ACCURACY
ColumnSourceConfidenceNotes
Uptime / Downtimesar_status_connection_online gauge · 60s step✓ DIRECTMeasured. Resolution ±60s per state transition.
Failover events (mdm / online / offline)sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters✓ DIRECTCounter increments emitted by NetCloud on state-change alerts.
Primary (WAN) duration= uptime − cellular duration↔ INFERREDDerived from #1 and #4. Accuracy bounded by #4.
Secondary (Cellular) durationper-mdm event session timing, capped at 4h≈ ESTIMATEDBest-effort: each mdm event timed to the next online/offline event. Sessions longer than 4h are capped (NetCloud rarely reports continuous sessions).
Current connection (WAN / Cellular / Offline)instant gauge + last-2h event window✓ DIRECTWAN/Offline are gauge-direct. Cellular detection is inferred: online now + mdm event in last 2h + more mdm than online events.
Trend arrow (▲▼·)comparison vs same weekday last week (T-7)✓ DIRECTSame gauge over same hour-of-week window.
Per-SIM split (SIM1 vs SIM2)not exposed by Prometheus✗ UNAVAILABLERequires a swift-nav/sar PR to surface per-slot metrics. Not in this report.
CONFIDENCE LABELS
✓ DIRECTObserved. Read straight from a Prometheus gauge or counter at query time. Highest trust.
↔ INFERREDDeduced. Derived via fixed logic from other DIRECT measurements (e.g. primary = uptime − cellular). Logically correct if its inputs are — trace the source chain to gauge trust.
≈ ESTIMATEDApproximated. Numeric best-effort when no direct metric exists (e.g. cellular session = mdm event → next event, capped at 4 h). Carries an unknown error margin.
✗ UNAVAILABLENot exposed by any data source we can read. Requires upstream work (SAR PR, NetCloud API) before we can surface it.
STATUS GUIDE
StatusWhat it meansCount
stableNo problems. Station stayed on its main connection the whole time.38
outage, no failoverWent offline but cellular backup didn't kick in. Worth checking.42
brief failoverSwitched to cellular a few times (1–4). Wired connection had small blips.60
FLAPPINGSwitched to cellular many times and recovered each time (5+). Wired is unstable.10
STUCK / degradedSwitched to cellular but didn't come back cleanly. Station is degraded.96
ON CELLULARProbably running on cellular backup right now (best guess).1
OFFLINE (entire window)Station was unreachable the entire window. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.2

THIS IS A TEST Ticket. DT is doing a IM test

 

DFMG/DT is doing a test run with Networks and Nokia. The issue is that Site DTSW is not tracking satellites on the AsteRx-U receiver. Need to send out FT to troubleshoot and resolve issue.

GCIM-633Completed
During an intervention on 02/24/25 The UPS beeps 3 times, every 30 seconds. The UPS was like this before and a…

During an intervention on 02/24/25
The UPS beeps 3 times, every 30 seconds.
The UPS was like this before and after the technicien replaced the battery.
Appears to indicate an internal fault. Tech was unable to clear the alarms.
The UPS has been left with the old battery, and the new one will be returned to Nokia as unused.

T-00003663GC-11 (00603-11)2024-09-1809:002024-09-1809:002024-09-1805:52—2024-10-0705:50
GCIM-314Completed
AL 5/3/2024 - Station started running on battery backup at 07:30 UTC 05/03/24 Station went offline at 09:45 UT…

AL 5/3/2024 - Station started running on battery backup at 07:30 UTC 05/03/24
Station went offline at 09:45 UTC 05/03/24

This is the 3rd outage in the past 30 days,
Initial issue:
"I send response form field engineer.

I wanted to inform you that we have identified the problem in the electrical panel of the rectifier's boiler, which was affecting the service. To resolve it, we proceeded to restart the electrical panel, which successfully restored the service. I appreciate the confirmation you have sent."

Potentially we should look at what changes could be made.
The electrical panel being modified so that our system is fed from a separate circuit?
Note that a UPS is used, so a non ground fault interrupter may be more suitable.

T-00004124GC-08 (00603-08)2025-06-1512:092025-06-1607:302025-06-1601:01—2025-08-2005:42
GCIM-518Completed
We want Nokia/Circet to return and secure the breaker for the power. Orange are also required to check the fix…

We want Nokia/Circet to return and secure the breaker for the power.

Orange are also required to check the fixed line.

Circet previously noted that the breaker is located on the ground floor, near the elevator and stairs, making it easily accessible to a wide range of individuals. They also suggested the potential installation of a lockable box to prevent intentional disruption of the breaker. Could this be further investigated and installed?

We have previously experienced interference with both power and communication links. To prevent any disruption to the station\'s operation, we would like to implement measures to protect the power supply wherever possible.

Original ticket

The station is currently offline, Suspected grid power issue.
01/22/2025 08:01:41 AM - The device entered the "offline" state.
01/22/2025 07:39:25 AM - Battery State is Exhausted!
01/22/2025 05:57:06 AM - Power Source is Backup Battery

  2. x410 does not control the lancom, check the switchable plug wiring.

The objective is a Nokia/Indigo GBTA site intervention. The content of the job incl. needed spare parts and to…

The objective is a Nokia/Indigo GBTA site intervention.

 

The content of the job incl. needed spare parts and tools is described in the enclosed PDF handout.

The content has been pre-agreed with Indigo through Claire Johnson from Nokia.

 

The date of site visit needs to agreed with Peter Budek +49 171 2036939 (peter.budek@telekom.de)

He will provide remote back office support. Martin Rickson +44 (7542) 664498 is an alternative local contact.

GCIM-778Completed
The station is currently offline, Following an intervention on 09/04/25, the infrabox should be replaced, Adel…

The station is currently offline, Following an intervention on 09/04/25, the infrabox should be replaced, Adel UPS failure.

T-00004236GC-13 (00603-13)2025-08-2019:022025-08-2200:002025-08-2208:48—2025-09-1506:00
GCIM-513Completed
Station is currently offline, This ticket supersedes https://swift-nav.atlassian.net/browse/GCIM-485 There is…

Station is currently offline, This ticket supersedes https://swift-nav.atlassian.net/browse/GCIM-485

There is a suspected issue with the Adel UPS within the Infrabox following a visit on 01/09/25

The adel is detective? voltage in, but not out? Screen is not on.

Therefore the GC cabinet is off, therefore the x410 has not powered the CPE/Lancom on.

However we do have power into the infrabox as the service plug has power. 

As discussed with Peter Budek, Infrabox replacement is probably the most promising option.

T-00004044GC-11 (00603-11)2025-04-2602:20—2025-04-2802:31—2025-04-3008:46
GCIM-598Completed
The station's UPS battery was replaced on 03/27/25. Approximately four hours after the technician departed the…

The station's UPS battery was replaced on 03/27/25. Approximately four hours after the technician departed the site, the station lost grid power and operated on battery backup for nearly 10 hours.

• The station is currently offline, Suspected grid power issue.
• Station appeared to start running on battery backup at approximately 15:05 UTC 03/27/25
• Battery became exhausted and the station went offline at approximately 12:43 UTC 03/28/25.

GCIM-592Completed
The ITMA 01 receiver is not tracking Can you remotely connect to it? yes Has it been rebooted remotely? yes -…

The ITMA 01 receiver is not tracking

Can you remotely connect to it? yes
Has it been rebooted remotely? yes - stopped sending data after reboot
Do the coordinates match sitetracker? - no, updated and then reverted back - screen shot is before changes were carried out
Are you confident the issue is with the connectors/cable/antenna? yes - cable connectors i suspect

The lancom intermittently connected using LTE backup, in the past week, the lancom have been on LTE backup 7 t…

The lancom intermittently connected using LTE backup, in the past week, the lancom have been on LTE backup 7 times, with a combined time of around 20 hours.

On 05/18/23 there was an intervention, the VDF modem was moved outside of the infrabox.

T-00004292GC-11 (00603-11)2025-09-2307:502025-09-2307:502025-09-2307:57—2025-10-2406:08
GCIM-791Completed
The station is currently offline, likely due to a grid power issue. Please begin by performing a remote check…

The station is currently offline, likely due to a grid power issue.

Please begin by performing a remote check for any power-related faults.

Given the site’s location, should an onsite intervention be required, we should also discuss the option of sending a replacement Adel UPS battery and how this may impact the restoration timeframe.

Per discussion in the 4P Issue Meeting on 7/20, this is a ticket to trigger a site visit to check in the inter…

Per discussion in the 4P Issue Meeting on 7/20, this is a ticket to trigger a site visit to check in the internal barrel connectors. We believe this is the cause of the current downtime after the recent cabinet swap.

T-00001968GC-11 (00603-11)2023-07-0408:302023-07-0408:452023-07-2113:52—2023-08-0109:13
GCIM-72Completed
Per discussion in the 4P Issue Meeting, this is a ticket to trigger the replacement of the PRBR cabinet. Since…

Per discussion in the 4P Issue Meeting, this is a ticket to trigger the replacement of the PRBR cabinet. Since this site us currently up, have made this a low priority ticket.

T-00001843GC-11 (00603-11)——2023-06-2621:10—2023-07-2113:33
GCIM-62Completed
This station has gone off-line multiple times. The original ticket, https://swift-nav.atlassian.net/browse/GCI…

This station has gone off-line multiple times. The original ticket, https://swift-nav.atlassian.net/browse/GCIM-38 was closed per request by Network Ops. For that incident, the station went down 4/24/2023 and then came back up 4/25/2023 without intervention. The NOC was going to keep that ticket open when the station went down again a second time, but a new ticket was opened in SiteTracker that spawned this new ticket in JIRA. This ticket was originally closed as a duplicate but was reopened to maintain synch with ST.

The intervention by Networks! was triggered from https://swift-nav.atlassian.net/browse/GCIM-38 and also discussed during the weekly 4P Open Tickets call.

The NOC will make sure to update this ticket with the intervention information from 6/5/2023

T-00001702GC-11 (00603-11)————2023-07-0712:48
GCIM-38Completed

Power loss on multiple days. Has been stable since 4/25/2023

PRLB has a history of requiring the circuit breaker to be reset.

T-00003809GC-11 (00603-11)2024-12-0319:032024-12-0408:002024-12-0409:57—2024-12-0406:22
GCIM-361Completed
SVKE experienced an outage at around 04:17 – 08:49 CEST 07/28/24 The station did not appear to go on battery b…

SVKE experienced an outage at around 04:17 – 08:49 CEST 07/28/24

The station did not appear to go on battery backup prior to going offline,
The Lancom shows an outage between 04:19 - 08:49

Once it came back online, the CHC was not sending observations, I reset the Cartesian “here” and observations started being sent.

No significant NC alerts as to why the station went offline.
07/28/2024 08:48:19 AM - The device entered the "online" state.
07/28/2024 04:26:30 AM - The device entered the "offline" state.
07/28/2024 04:17:23 AM - Reboot The device has been rebooted.

Looking at the Adel Grafana page, over the past 90 days, there is evidence of the Adel going from charging to not charging, but no sign of it running on battery backup.

Excerpts from the Adel event log (please note that the times are 40 minutes behind, these lines are highlighted red in the spreadsheet, I have since synced the clock to CEST)

28/07/2024 - 08:10:10 - Display Display turned ON
28/07/2024 - 03:39:15 - Device 1 Alarm ON Low battery state of charge
28/07/2024 - 03:39:14 - Device 1 Device connected
28/07/2024 - 03:39:07 - Display Display turned ON

The config for the Adel, appears to match other stations, so I do not think there is an issue with that.
All the pictures from the install look ok, from what I can see everything looks connected etc.
I suspect that there is an issue with the Adel running on battery backup.

GCIM-317Completed

The Lancom is showing as offline or on LTE backup.

SWSK01 - Septentrio PolaRx5 Stopped sending Data/obs at around16:30 UTC 06/02/24 Unable to remotely reach the…

SWSK01 - Septentrio PolaRx5
Stopped sending Data/obs at around16:30 UTC 06/02/24
Unable to remotely reach the septentrio receiver, it does not appear on the cradlepoints client list. Tried rebooting receiver & cradlepoint to no avail.
Onsite intervention required, with spare GC cabinet.

TicketStatusDescriptionST #SKUStartDetectEscalatedEndClosed
GCIM-141Completed
Stations effected: FIEK, FIII, FIIV, FIJM, FIJO, FIKL, FIKM, FILA, FILV, FIMU, FIUU Stations initially experie…

Stations effected: FIEK, FIII, FIIV, FIJM, FIJO, FIKL, FIKM, FILA, FILV, FIMU, FIUU

Stations initially experienced outages at 18:30, intermittently lasting upto 40 minutes, some stations were then effected at 02:16 lasting upto 15 minutes.

Lancom - From a sample, some stations, a spike up up in cloud round trip time, dip in WAN sent throughput/Ethernet throughput 

SRO - From a sample, some stations showed the DSL outage, and some didn't.

Times are in CET
